'''thataza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oolemma|oolemma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oolemma|oolemma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thataza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thætæzæth|thætæzæth]] || [[word:thætæzæj|thætæzæj]] || [[word:thætæzæsh|thætæzæsh]] || [[word:thætæzæ|thætæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatatazath|thatatazath]] || [[word:thatatazaj|thatatazaj]] || [[word:thatatazash|thatatazash]] || [[word:thatataza|thatataza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazath|thatazath]] || [[word:thatazaj|thatazaj]] || [[word:thatazash|thatazash]] || [[word:thataza|thataza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatafzath|thatafzath]] || [[word:thatafzaj|thatafzaj]] || [[word:thatafzash|thatafzash]] || [[word:thatafzaf|thatafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thatazatha|thatazatha]] || [[word:thatazaja|thatazaja]] || [[word:thatazasha|thatazasha]] || [[word:thatazaka|thatazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thatazath|thatazath]] || [[word:thatazaj|thatazaj]] || [[word:thatazash|thatazash]] || [[word:thataza|thataza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thatazathal|thatazathal]] || [[word:thatazajal|thatazajal]] || [[word:thatazashal|thatazashal]] || [[word:thatazakal|thatazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thatazathatha|thatazathatha]] || [[word:thatazajaja|thatazajaja]] || [[word:thatazashasha|thatazashasha]] || [[word:thatazaka|thatazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thatazathan|thatazathan]] || [[word:thatazajan|thatazajan]] || [[word:thatazashan|thatazashan]] || [[word:thatazakan|thatazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thatazathaoro|thatazathaoro]] || [[word:thatazajaoro|thatazajaoro]] || [[word:thatazashaoro|thatazashaoro]] || [[word:thatazakaoro|thatazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
